allowed_read_scope: Public marketplace/category pages only. Capture product formats, pricing patterns, buyer problem signals, creator/listing requirements, fees, and payment/account gates.
evidence_needed: A local digital-product opportunity shortlist with product idea, build artifact, marketplace terms/payment gates, and first local prototype task.
forbidden_actions: No login, signup, listing creation, purchase, payment setup, message, review, upload, or public promotion.
